title: Dogfood Pass 0008 AI4Science Market Proof-Packet Wedges

claims.text: Pass 0008 created a source-backed AI4Science frontier map with at least 16 rows, and every row includes a source URL, buyer, positioning, capabilities, proof-layer gap, gap status, Telos wedge hypothesis, uniqueness-claim status, and confidence.
claims.falsification: ai4science-frontier-map-pass-0008.json has fewer than 16 rows or any row lacks a required market-map field

claims.text: The pass 0008 market map covers automated-discovery, formal-math, literature-search, lab-platform, and workflow-notebook categories.
claims.falsification: ai4science-frontier-map-pass-0008.json omits any of the five required categories

claims.text: Pass 0008 labels uniqueness and gap claims as hypotheses or inferred/verified status rather than treating no-competitor claims as fact.
claims.falsification: any pass 0008 market-map row sets uniqueness_claim_status to fact or uses an unlabeled no-competitor claim

claims.text: Pass 0008 ranks research-proof-packet-adapter-pack as the primary 30-day market push.
claims.falsification: proof-packet-market-wedges-pass-0008.json does not name research-proof-packet-adapter-pack as the primary 30-day push or lacks exactly one rank=1 wedge

claims.text: The pass 0008 validator reports MATCH with two checks and zero drift.
claims.falsification: pass-0008-market-validator-result.json is missing, reports non-MATCH status, reports fewer than two matches, or reports drift above zero

claims.text: Pass 0008 promotes zero natural-law discoveries; all outputs remain market research, integration strategy, or validation artifacts.
claims.falsification: any pass 0008 artifact labels a natural law, theorem breakthrough, biological result, material result, medical result, finance result, or safety result as promoted
